data.name: Info.FillOnlyChangedFields
data.value: Fill in only the fields you want to change. Empty fields will be left unchanged.

data.name: Info.ChangesSentToAdmin
data.value: Your changes will be sent to the administrator.

data.name: Warning.DomainOnly
data.value: This page is available only when signed in with domain authentication.

data.name: Warning.ContactNotFound
data.value: Your contact record was not found in the contacts database. Please contact IT.

data.name: Field.Message.Placeholder
data.value: For example, since when the new details apply

data.name: Snackbar.UpdateRequestSent
data.value: The update request has been sent to the administrator.

data.name: Snackbar.SendRequestError
data.value: An error occurred while sending the request.

data.name: Error.ResolveUserIdFailed
data.value: Could not determine your user identifier in the system.

data.name: Error.LoadContactFailed
data.value: An error occurred while loading the data.

data.name: Error.MissingLoggedUserId
data.value: Missing logged in user identifier. Refresh the page and try again.

data.name: Error.SendRequestFailed
data.value: Could not send the update request.
